---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<div style="padding:3rem 6vw; max-width:1200px; margin:0 auto;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:2.5rem;">
    <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.15em; color:#f0a500; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:0.5rem;">// praticiens</p>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.8rem); font-weight:800; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0 0 0.5rem 0;">Les gens qui construisent</h1>
    <p style="color:#6b7280; font-size:0.9rem; margin:0 0 2rem 0;">Profils de praticiens tech — Data, DevOps, Cloud, IA, Cybersécurité, MLOps, Dev.</p>

    <!-- Filtres -->
    <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.5rem;">
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('all', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #f0a500; color:#f0a500; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Tous
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('open', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        ● Disponibles
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('data', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Data
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('devops', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        DevOps
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('cloud', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Cloud
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('ia', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        IA
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('cybersecurite', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        Cybersécurité
      </button>
      <button onclick="filterPraticiens('mlops', this)"
        style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; background:transparent; border:1px solid #1e2128; color:#6b7280; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:2px; cursor:pointer;">
        MLOps
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="praticiens-grid" style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr)); gap:1.25rem;"></div>
  <p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#6b7280; font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.85rem; margin-top:2rem;">Aucun praticien dans cette catégorie.</p>

</div>

<script>
const praticiens = [
  {
    slug:         "diakite",
    name:         "Diakité Mamadou Youssouf",
    role:         "Data Engineer",
    country:      "🇨🇮",
    city:         "Abidjan",
    stack:        ["Python", "Airflow", "dbt", "Spark", "GCP"],
    category:     "data",
    open_to_work: false,
    linkedin:     "https://linkedin.com/in/diakite",
    github:       "https://github.com/diakite-data",
    bio:          "Fondateur de from0tohero.dev. 1100+ apprenants formés en Data Engineering."
  }
];

function renderPraticiens(list) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('praticiens-grid');
  const noRes = document.getElementById('no-results');
  if (!list.length) { grid.innerHTML = ''; noRes.style.display = 'block'; return; }
  noRes.style.display = 'none';
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(p => `
    <a href="${p.slug}.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
      <div style="background:#12141a; border:1px solid #1e2128; border-radius:6px; padding:1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.75rem; transition:border-color 0.2s;"
           onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='#f0a500'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='#1e2128'">

        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;">
          <div>
            <p style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif; font-size:1rem; font-weight:700; color:#e8e4d9; margin:0;">${p.name}</p>
            <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.72rem; color:#f0a500; margin:0.2rem 0 0 0;">${p.role}</p>
          </div>
          <span style="font-size:1.2rem;">${p.country}</span>
        </div>

        <p style="font-size:0.83rem; color:#9ca3af; line-height:1.6; margin:0;">${p.bio}</p>

        <div style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.4rem;">
          ${p.stack.map(s => `
            <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#6b7280; border:1px solid #1e2128; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:2px;">${s}</span>
          `).join('')}
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; margin-top:0.25rem;">
          <span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#6b7280;">${p.city}</span>
          ${p.open_to_work
            ? `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#00e676;">● disponible</span>`
            : `<span style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace; font-size:0.65rem; color:#6b7280;">○ non dispo</span>`
          }
        </div>

      </div>
    </a>
  `).join('');
}

function filterPraticiens(filter, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('#praticiens-grid').forEach(() => {});
  document.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => {
    b.style.borderColor = '#1e2128';
    b.style.color = '#6b7280';
  });
  btn.style.borderColor = '#f0a500';
  btn.style.color = '#f0a500';

  let filtered = praticiens;
  if (filter === 'open')  filtered = praticiens.filter(p => p.open_to_work);
  else if (filter !== 'all') filtered = praticiens.filter(p => p.category === filter);
  renderPraticiens(filtered);
}

renderPraticiens(praticiens);
</script>
```
